scenario_name: Agent Demo - Pattern Detection with Borderline Cost
description: Designed to trigger both CostEstimatorAgent and ValidatorAgent

damage_assessment.description: Medium scratch on rear bumper, third similar damage at Munich Airport this quarter
damage_assessment.inspector_notes: Customer has pattern of similar damages at same location. Cost is borderline.

notes: This scenario is designed to trigger LLM reasoning: multiple affected parts + pattern at high-risk location
